TextRun.Text: 2. make your study time more effect
you have achieved , and this will keep you

RichText.Text: 1. find it difficult to focus 2. make your study time more effective 3. be easily interrupted 4. make you tired and less productive 5. take regular breaks 6. make your study more purposeful and manageable manage your time wisely 7. keep track of your assignments and tests 8. a journey full of possibilities 9. With so many distractions around, it is easy to lose concentration. 10. It feels great to see what you have achieved , and this will keep you motivated. 11. China's walking robots have developed in recent years.

TextRun.Text: 9. 周围有那么多令人分心的事物，
10. 看到自己取得的成就会感觉很棒，
11. 中国的行走机器人近年来

RichText.Text: 1. 发现很难集中注意力 2. 让学习时间更高效 3. 容易被干扰 4. 让你感到疲惫且效率更低 5. 定期休息 6. 让学习更有目的性和 可管理性 明智地安排时间 7. 跟进/追踪作业和考试 8. 充满可能性的旅程 9. 周围有那么多令人分心的事物， 很容易走神。 10. 看到自己取得的成就会感觉很棒， 这能让你保持动力。 11. 中国的行走机器人近年来 取得了发展。
